use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in dashboards or settings
Showing user avatars in comment sections or chat applications
Representing team members or contacts in lists
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with fallback support. Features rounded-full styling with flexible sizing and responsive design. Includes AvatarImage for the image source and AvatarFallback for text display when images fail to load.
